section1.title: 1. General Provisions
section1.p1: This Cookie Policy regulates the use of cookies and similar technologies on the TyPlace platform.
section1.p2: By using the website, the User agrees to the use of cookies in accordance with this Policy.

section2.title: 2. What Cookies Are Used
section2.required: Essential cookies — necessary for proper website operation, security, user authentication, and service functionality.
section2.functional: Functional cookies — allow saving selected language, currency, and user preferences.
section2.analytics: Analytical cookies — used to analyze traffic and improve platform performance (with user consent).
section2.technical: Technical cookies — ensure the operation of chats, escrow system, anti-fraud mechanisms, and other internal processes.

section3.title: 3. Purpose of Use
section3.li2: processing payments and operating the escrow mechanism;

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
section4.p1: The platform may use third-party analytics services and payment systems that may set their own cookies in accordance with their privacy policies.
section4.p2: TyPlace does not control the use of cookies by third-party services.

section5.title: 5. Managing Cookies
section5.p1: Users can manage cookies through their browser settings. Users may also choose cookie types through the consent banner on the website.
section5.p2: Disabling essential cookies may result in improper platform operation.

section6.title: 6. Policy Changes
section6.p1: The platform reserves the right to modify this Policy. The current version is always published on this page.
